Tripo API | Integrate, Automate, and Scale with AI 3D Modeling

Try Tripo Studio
Try Tripo Studio

The most advanced API platform for generative 3D

Create products, experiences and workflows with the most powerful 3D foundation model

The most advanced API platform for generative 3D

Create products, experiences and workflows with the most powerful 3D foundation model

View API Pricing

Our Key Features

Discover the cutting-edge capabilities that set our platform apart, from industry-leading generation speed and quality to intuitive workflows designed to enhance your 3D creation experience

Multi-Image to 3D

Upload front, side, and top views to generate high-fidelity 3D models with unmatched accuracy.

Image to Model

Transform any object photo into an accurate 3D model instantly, with automatic background removal.

Text to Model

Simply describe what you want, and watch as our AI creates custom 3D models—no technical skills required.

Animation

Bring static models to life with our automated animation tools, perfect for storytelling and interactive experiences.

Generate with Style

Transform your 3D models using six iconic styles—cartoon, clay, Alien, Christmas, retro steampunk, and more.

Post-Processing

Fine-tune your creations with polycount control, mesh conversion, and formats conversion. Add creative flair with LEGO, voxel, Voronoi, or Minecraft styling.

Our Key Features

Discover the cutting-edge capabilities that set our platform apart, from industry-leading generation speed and quality to intuitive workflows designed to enhance your 3D creation experience

Multi-Image to 3D

Upload front, side, and top views to generate high-fidelity 3D models with unmatched accuracy.

Image to Model

Transform any object photo into an accurate 3D model instantly, with automatic background removal.

Text to Model

Simply describe what you want, and watch as our AI creates custom 3D models—no technical skills required.

Animation

Bring static models to life with our automated animation tools, perfect for storytelling and interactive experiences.

Generate with Style

Transform your 3D models using six iconic styles—cartoon, clay, Alien, Christmas, retro steampunk, and more.

Post-Processing

Fine-tune your creations with polycount control, mesh conversion, and formats conversion. Add creative flair with LEGO, voxel, Voronoi, or Minecraft styling.

Flagship Models

Discover our advanced AI 3D generation models, engineered to provide exceptional detail, realism, and performance

Fast

Tripo v1.4

Our model enables fast generation with realistic texture effects.

Accurate

Tripo v2.0

Our model generates industry-leading geometry with PBR.

Balanced

Tripo v2.5

Fast and consistent; good for moderate cases.

Powerful

Tripo v3.0

Sculpture-level geometry precision with sharp edges.

More Powerful

Use Cases

Transforms workflows across different industries, providing innovative solutions tailored to your needs.

🕹️ Gaming/ Animation/ Film/ CG

🎥 Social Media/ Streaming
